message:
security: fix ReDoS vulnerability and improve hook robustness

- Fix CRITICAL ReDoS in reading-time.ts: replaced nested regex quantifiers
  with simple non-greedy patterns to prevent catastrophic backtracking
- Fix use-click-particles RAF cleanup: add isUnmountedRef flag to prevent
  stale requestAnimationFrame callbacks after unmount
- Fix use-konami: add SSR guard and null-safe callback invocation
- Add NaN guards to formatReach and formatNumber for edge case handling
- Strengthen type guard in isValidStargazerIntelligence with NaN check
- Update content.ts: remove obsolete project, update stats

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
